CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JAMES WOODARD BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-31-2008 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLD, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESERT VIEW AUTO AUCTIONS $5,360.87 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,360.87, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S CAR TO BE A TOTAL LOSS. DEFENDANT WOODARD DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
